description: Style Note Lend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear. Product Details Caramel brown shoe with central lace- ups, inlays, overlays and pull loop at the heel collar Padded tongue and inner Thick rubber midsole TPU outsole with geometrical shaped lugs, arched midfoot and a stacked heel Material and Care Leather Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store under direct sunlight
